# Skill: webapp-testing

- Command: `/spec-first:webapp-testing`
- Use when writing or reviewing end-to-end tests for web apps.
- Best practices:
  - Prefer stable selectors.
  - Assert visible user outcomes.
- Caveats:
  - Keep tests independent and deterministic.
